_comment: This is the schema reference AND the generic default look (used when the user has no brand colours/fonts of their own). Copy this file per project, don't edit it in place. Demonstrates: a short cover headline (it renders huge, at ~75% of the frame, so brevity still matters there), left-aligned content slides, a punch slide for the closure beat, and the CTA confirmed wording.

slides.headline: A headline that never gives away the answer
Escalates slide 1, still doesn't reveal the payoff
A slide can continue the last one
slides.body: Storytelling and open loops are fine. Cutting a real story down to a fake one-liner isn't.

slides.headline: A specific ask, never 'follow for more'
slides.body: One sentence saying exactly what happens next.
